creator: Shebeko.A.V.sav@sibptus.tomsk.ru
text:
NOTE: DRI support is disabled

===>  Building for xf86-video-radeonhd-devel-1.2.3.20081103
make  all-recursive
Making all in src
/bin/sh ../git_version.sh -k -s .. -o git_version.h
git: not found
git_version.sh: Output is new file, creating git_version.h
make  all-am
/bin/sh /usr/local/bin/libtool --tag=CC   --mode=compile cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I..@am__isrc@ -I./AtomBios/includes   -I/usr/local/include/xorg -I/usr/local/include/pixman-1 -I/usr/local/include     -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Werror-implicit-function-declaration -Wstrict-aliasing -Wstrict-overflow -Wpointer-arith -Woverlength-strings -Wvolatile-register-var -Winit-self -Wbad-function-cast -Wstrict-prototypes -Wold-style-definition -Wnested-externs -Wdisabled-optimization  -pedantic -Wno-long-long -Wno-variadic-macros -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -finline-functions -MT radeonhd_drv_la-r5xx_accel.lo -MD -MP -MF .deps/radeonhd_drv_la-r5xx_accel.Tpo -c -o radeonhd_drv_la-r5xx_accel.lo `test -f 'r5xx_accel.c' || echo './'`r5xx_accel.c
mkdir .libs
 cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I..@am__isrc@ -I./AtomBios/includes -I/usr/local/include/xorg -I/usr/local/include/pixman-1 -I/usr/local/include -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Werror-implicit-function-declaration -Wstrict-aliasing -Wstrict-overflow -Wpointer-arith -Woverlength-strings -Wvolatile-register-var -Winit-self -Wbad-function-cast -Wstrict-prototypes -Wold-style-definition -Wnested-externs -Wdisabled-optimization -pedantic -Wno-long-long -Wno-variadic-macros -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -finline-functions -MT radeonhd_drv_la-r5xx_accel.lo -MD -MP -MF .deps/radeonhd_drv_la-r5xx_accel.Tpo -c r5xx_accel.c  -fPIC -DPIC -o .libs/radeonhd_drv_la-r5xx_accel.o
r5xx_accel.c:66:20: error: config.h: No such file or directory
In file included from r5xx_accel.c:71:
rhd.h:30:4: error: #error "config.h missing!"
*** Error code 1

Stop in /var/tmp/ports/usr/ports/x11-drivers/xf86-video-radeonhd-devel/work/xf86-video-radeonhd-1.2.3.20081103/src.
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat:   cd ports/x11-drivers/xf86-video-radeonhd-devel
  make
